items.title: Nigeria's president demands to know how fake agency was allegedly set up in his office
items.dek: Adeniyi Adeyemi allegedly forged a letter of appointment and secured funding for an agency the presidency knew nothing about.
items.body: Adeniyi Adeyemi allegedly forged a letter of appointment and secured funding for an agency the presidency knew nothing about.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump says ceasefire is 'over' after US and Iran trade strikes
items.dek: Speaking ahead of a Nato summit, the president says US negotiators can keep talking with the Iranians "if they want".
items.body: Speaking ahead of a Nato summit, the president says US negotiators can keep talking with the Iranians "if they want".
items.author: IriLine Desk
